code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
end

let a = match nums.get(0)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end
let b_end = match nums.get(1)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end
let s = match nums.get(2)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut x = a
while x < b_end
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  x = x + s
end
println(out)
